signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: The consumer we see today is quite healthy. They're able and willing to pay us back. They're borrowing money.
signal_evidence.credit_quality_trend: If you look at the chart of the NACO curves, you'll see that these are super tightly run lines that are just one on top of the other.
signal_evidence.services_demand: Services is a good example [of a category broken out from 'other']. We started breaking that out, I believe, two quarters ago now... the business is growing quite well.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: Flat pricing in a declining rate environment is actually the same thing as taking price.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: I don't have anything dramatic or alternative to offer on the state of affairs in the current quarter either. We're not seeing a big deviation from what I just said about the past.
